title: OpenAI’s new voice mode makes it to the ChatGPT desktop app
excerpt: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.
content_html:
In Brief

Posted:

6:36 AM PDT · July 24, 2026

OpenAI on Thursday said it has updated its ChatGPT desktop app to add support for ChatGPT Voice, allowing users to talk to the app to control AI agents and perform tasks on their computer.

The new feature taps OpenAI’s new family of voice models called ChatGPT-Live, which it launched earlier this month.

OpenAI said ChatGPT Voice works with both ChatGPT Work and Codex, and can also tap computer use skills to look up websites and apps. Plus, on macOS, with Appshots, users can let the app access what’s on their screen, including alt-text.

At launch, ChatGPT Voice’s smartphone version featured smoother conversations, with better interruption handling, but it was not built to take action on smartphones.

Thursday’s desktop update is more capable, allowing users to dictate complex commands involving many steps, and respond when ChatGPT needs their input.

In a demo video, OpenAI showed a developer asking ChatGPT to create a new thread, make a pull request, and find the root cause for a bug, with one command.

The company said that users can utilize ChatGPT Voice in Codex from the iOS app through remote access.

Anthropic has also updated its voice mode for Claude, which can tap the company’s Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models to complete tasks in apps like Gmail, Calendar, Slack, Notion, and Canva.

The new feature taps OpenAI’s new family of voice models called ChatGPT-Live, which it launched earlier this month. OpenAI said ChatGPT Voice works with both ChatGPT Work and Codex, and can also tap computer use skills to look up websites and apps. Plus, on macOS, with Appshots, users can let the app access what’s on their screen, including alt-text. At launch, ChatGPT Voice’s smartphone version featured smoother conversations, with better interruption handling, but it was not built to take action on smartphones. Thursday’s desktop update is more capable, allowing users to dictate complex commands involving many steps, and respond when ChatGPT needs their input. In a demo video, OpenAI showed a developer asking ChatGPT to create a new thread, make a pull request, and find the root cause for a bug, with one command. ChatGPT Voice is now in the desktop app.Control your computer and direct multiple agents running in ChatGPT Work or Codex, using just your voice. It's powered by GPT-Live, so it can speak, listen, and coordinate work in the app at the same time.Rolling out globally today… pic.twitter.com/ODZWKqecCf— OpenAI (@OpenAI) July 23, 2026 The company said that users can utilize ChatGPT Voice in Codex from the iOS app through remote access. Anthropic has also updated its voice mode for Claude, which can tap the company’s Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models to complete tasks in apps like Gmail, Calendar, Slack, Notion, and Canva. content_html_zh:
简介

发布：

太平洋夏令时间上午 6:36 · 2026 年 7 月 24 日

OpenAI 周四表示，它已经更新了 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序，添加了对 ChatGPT Voice 的支持，允许用户与该应用程序对话来控制 AI 代理并在计算机上执行任务。

这项新功能利用了 OpenAI 本月早些时候推出的名为 ChatGPT-Live 的新语音模型系列。

OpenAI 表示，ChatGPT Voice 可与 ChatGPT Work 和 Codex 配合使用，还可以利用计算机使用技能来查找网站和应用程序。 此外，在 macOS 上，通过 Appshots，用户可以让应用程序访问屏幕上的内容，包括替代文本。

推出时，ChatGPT Voice 的智能手机版本具有更流畅的对话和更好的中断处理能力，但它并不是为了在智能手机上采取行动而设计的。

周四的桌面更新功能更加强大，允许用户口述涉及许多步骤的复杂命令，并在 ChatGPT 需要他们的输入时做出响应。

在演示视频中，OpenAI 向开发人员展示了一名开发人员要求 ChatGPT 使用一个命令创建一个新线程、发出拉取请求并找到错误的根本原因。

该公司表示，用户可以通过远程访问从 iOS 应用程序中使用 Codex 中的 ChatGPT Voice。

Anthropic 还更新了 Claude 的语音模式，可以利用该公司的 Opus、Sonnet 和 Haiku 模型来完成 Gmail、Calendar、Slack、Notion 和 Canva 等应用程序中的任务。
